title: Lines, Containers, Headings, Paragraphs, Lists, Quotes, and Fenced Code · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs lines, containers, headings, paragraphs, lists, quotes, and fenced code from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for line-oriented block parser with explicit continuation rules after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case pra…
objectives: Represent line content, indentation, blankness, offset, tab expansion, newline, and container prefix without discarding source positions.
Apply named block-start and continuation precedence so paragraphs, headings, quotes, lists, thematic breaks, and code resolve consistently.
Parse ATX headings and paragraphs with closing-marker, interruption, inline-content, and empty-heading evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Match opening and closing fence character and length, retain info text and literal content, and define end-of-file behavior. Artifact under review: line-oriented block parser with explicit continuation rules.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Fenced Code, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.
